---
title: "STAT 360 Submission Checklist"
format: gfm
---

## GitHub / code submission

- Upload the contents of `Final Submission/mars/` to your GitHub project folder/repository.
- Make sure the repo contains the package source files, README, tests, examples, and documentation files.

## Crowdmark / documentation submission

- Submit the PDF version of `Final Submission/documentation_submission`.
- Before submitting, replace the placeholder GitHub repo link with your real repository link.

## Final quick checks

- Confirm the repo is accessible to the TA if needed.
- Confirm your PDF includes all rubric headings.
- Confirm you are submitting from `Final Submission/` and not from other scratch/build folders.
